case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN SURETY COMPANY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,200.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
